title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A global phenomenon, this story follows a young shepherd's journey to find his destiny.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A scientific guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones through tiny changes.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
description: A shocking psychological thriller about a woman's act of violence and her refusal to speak.

title: The Power of Habit
author: Charles Duhigg
description: Explores the science of habit formation and how it affects our lives and businesses.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A deep dive into how biology and history have defined human civilization.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: An essential guide to the origins of the universe and the nature of time.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
description: A psychological exploration of the two systems that drive our decision-making.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A fundamental book for software developers to write better and maintainable code.

title: Eloquent JavaScript
author: Marijn Haverbeke
description: A modern and deep introduction to programming using the JavaScript language.

author: George Orwell
description: A classic dystopian story about surveillance, control, and individual freedom.

title: Python Crash Course
author: Eric Matthes
description: A hands-on, project-based introduction to programming with Python.

title: Deep Learning
author: Ian Goodfellow
description: An academic and practical guide to the field of Artificial Intelligence and Neural Networks.
